summary: Bug Fixes Testing - Backend 11/11 PASS. All 3 bugs verified fixed. Frontend UI partially tested due to hardcoded production URL.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend api.ts line 4 has hardcoded production URL 'https://frikt-backend-production.up.railway.app' instead of using EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. This causes CORS errors when frontend preview tries to access production backend.

critical_code_review_comments: BUG 1 - formatTimeAgo utility: ✓ Correctly implemented in /app/frontend/src/utils/formatTimeAgo.ts. Handles UTC timestamps consistently with 'about X minutes/hours/days/weeks/months ago' format.
BUG 1 - ProblemCard.tsx: ✓ Uses formatTimeAgo(problem.created_at) on line 28
BUG 1 - problem/[id].tsx: ✓ Uses formatTimeAgo for both problem and comment timestamps (lines 20, 377, 618)
BUG 2 - GET /api/problems: ✓ Lines 1267-1279 fetch fresh usernames from user records via user_map lookup
BUG 2 - GET /api/problems/{id}/comments: ✓ Lines 1669-1682 fetch fresh usernames from user records
BUG 3 - PUT /api/comments/{id}: ✓ Lines 1722-1745 allow owner to edit, sets edited_at, returns 403 for non-owners
BUG 3 - DELETE /api/comments/{id}: ✓ Lines 1747-1781 allow owner to delete, decrements comment count, returns 403 for non-owners
BUG 3 - Frontend edit/delete UI: ✓ Lines 624-655 show edit/delete menu only for comment author (user && comment.user_id === user.id)
BUG 3 - Frontend shows (edited) label: ✓ Line 619 shows '(edited)' when comment.edited_at is set

success_rate.frontend: UI verified - timestamps show 'about X ago', code review confirms edit/delete UI

seed_data_creation: Test users created: test_bug_*, another test users for permission tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 bug fixes verified: 1) formatTimeAgo utility handles UTC timestamps and displays 'about X ago' format. 2) Backend GET endpoints fetch fresh usernames from user records. 3) PUT/DELETE /api/comments/{id} endpoints work with proper owner-only restrictions, frontend shows edit/delete menu only for comment author.

evidence: formatTimeAgo.ts utility correctly parses UTC timestamps
Frontend UI shows 'about 2 hours ago', 'about 19 hours ago', '4 days ago' etc.
Backend tests verify created_at is valid ISO datetime
test_problems_returns_fresh_username PASSED - updates displayName, GET /api/problems returns new name
test_comments_returns_fresh_username PASSED - updates displayName, GET /api/problems/{id}/comments returns new name
Backend uses user_map lookup from db.users to get current displayName
test_delete_own_comment_success PASSED - DELETE removes comment and decrements count
test_complete_comment_lifecycle PASSED - full create->edit->delete flow works
Frontend code shows edit/delete menu only when user.id === comment.user_id
